title: Nipah virus: Travel health notices - Canada.ca
content:
## Nipah virus: Travel health notices
- Symptoms and treatment
- Prevention and risks
- For health professionals
- Travel health notices
There are currently no Travel Health Notices for Nipah virus.
To find out if there is a risk of Nipah virus or other health risks at your travel destination, visit Travel advice and advisories by country, then:
- Select your destination and click "Go!"
- Click on the "Health" tab
For general information on travel health, visit the Travel health and safety section of Travel.gc.ca.
